primitiveRouteAFalseStatus.label: primitive route A is false
primitiveRouteAFalseStatus.reason: The primitive boundary audit records that primitive tests do not generally land in ker R_global.

primitiveTransportNoEndpointStatus.label: primitive transport has no endpoint term
primitiveTransportNoEndpointStatus.reason: For compact primitive tests F(0)=0 kills the lower endpoint and kernel decay kills infinity.

primitiveBoundaryZeroStatus.label: D_bdy is zero
primitiveBoundaryZeroStatus.reason: The canonical primitive boundary form is the zero form.

canonicalPrimitiveBoundaryZeroStatus.label: canonical primitive boundary form is zero
canonicalPrimitiveBoundaryZeroStatus.reason: The canonical primitive boundary form is the zero form.

primitiveBoundaryDescendsStatus.label: zero boundary descends to trace quotient
primitiveBoundaryDescendsStatus.reason: The zero boundary form descends through the completed trace quotient.

zeroBoundaryDescendsStatus.label: zero boundary form descends through R_global
zeroBoundaryDescendsStatus.reason: The zero boundary form descends through the completed trace quotient.

proof: Import the primitive boundary transport audit.
Extract only the endpoint consequence D_bdy=0 and its descent to the trace quotient.
